title: Panic Outfits
description: A full-stack e-commerce platform built with MERN stack. Features include product management, cart, payment integration, and admin dashboard.
problem: Merchants needed a scalable online store with real-time inventory management.
solution: Built a MERN stack application with REST APIs, JWT authentication, and Stripe payment gateway.
result: Reduced order processing time by 60% and improved user retention by 40%.

title: Blockchain Voting DApp
description: A decentralized voting application using Ethereum smart contracts, ensuring tamper-proof and transparent elections.
problem: Traditional voting systems are prone to fraud and lack transparency.
solution: Deployed smart contracts on Ethereum testnet with MetaMask wallet integration and real-time vote tallying.
result: Demo conducted with 500+ test participants, achieving 100% vote auditability.

title: Real-Time Chat App
description: A real-time messaging application with Socket.IO, featuring private rooms, notifications, and online presence indicators.
problem: Teams needed a lightweight, self-hosted chat solution with real-time capabilities.
solution: Implemented WebSocket connections via Socket.IO with Redis pub/sub for scalability.
result: Supports 1000+ concurrent users with < 100ms message latency.

title: NFT Marketplace
description: A full-featured NFT marketplace with minting, buying, selling, and auction capabilities on Ethereum.
problem: Artists needed a low-barrier platform to mint and sell NFTs.
solution: Built ERC-721 smart contracts with IPFS storage and OpenZeppelin security standards.
result: Successfully minted 200+ NFTs in beta phase with zero security incidents.

title: Task Management API
description: A RESTful task management API with microservices architecture, JWT authentication, and role-based access control.
problem: Startups needed a scalable, secure API for project management tools.
solution: Designed microservices with Docker containerization, rate limiting, and comprehensive Swagger docs.
result: API serves 10,000+ daily requests with 99.9% uptime.

title: DeFi Dashboard
description: A decentralized finance dashboard aggregating wallet balances, token swaps, and yield farming data.
problem: DeFi users needed a unified dashboard to track multiple protocol positions.
solution: Integrated Web3.js with multiple DeFi protocol ABIs and real-time price feeds from CoinGecko API.
result: Dashboard tracks $50k+ in test portfolio with sub-second data refresh.

title: Social Media App
description: A full-stack social media platform with posts, likes, comments, follow system, and real-time notifications.
problem: Niche communities needed a private, ad-free social network.
solution: Built a full MERN stack social platform with image uploads via Cloudinary and real-time Socket.IO notifications.
result: Onboarded 300+ beta users with an average session time of 12 minutes.

title: Smart Contract Audit Tool
description: A static analysis tool for Solidity smart contracts that detects common vulnerabilities like reentrancy and overflow.
problem: Developers needed an automated way to detect smart contract vulnerabilities before deployment.
solution: Built a parser for Solidity AST with pattern matching for OWASP top 10 smart contract vulnerabilities.
result: Detected vulnerabilities in 15 out of 20 sample contracts in a security audit test.
